# Calculator (Code classifier fixture)

A minimal Python arithmetic module used by `bin/tests/test_classify_project.py`
as a known-Code target for the v1.5.3 project-type classifier.

This README is markdown but is NOT named `SKILL.md`, and it sits at fixture
root rather than in a subdirectory, so the classifier should still report
Code (the heuristic only triggers Skill / Hybrid for `SKILL.md` at root).
